class_learn.title: Learn your Dungeons & Combat class — right-click the Class Book item to select your archetype

subtitle.text: Dungeons & Combat adds six combat classes. They are not suggestions.

description: CH.03 · SCALES & STEEL
▸ Dungeons & Combat adds a class system,
new armor sets, new weapons, new combat feel.
It changes how armor and damage interact at every tier.
◈ D&C CLASSES
└ Forgotten Knight — heavy armor, shield mastery
bonus: damage reduction scales with armor weight
└ Titan — strength build, slow but hits hard
bonus: bonus damage at low health
└ Oni Slayer — agile striker, light armor
bonus: attack speed and dual wield bonus
└ Exiled — cursed fighter, dark magic affinity
bonus: life steal on hit
└ + 2 unknown unlockable classes
discovered through boss drop class books
◈ DAMAGE SYSTEM
└ D&C adds armor penetration to some weapons
└ Shields block more damage from heavier attacks
└ Attack type matters: slash vs pierce vs blunt
└ Material scaling: diamond vs netherite weapon gap is real
◈ SCROLL: Scales & Steel
└ Found in: warrior barracks, combat guild archives,
dungeon treasuries, boss loot chests
└ Research time: 20 min
└ Unlocks: full D&C class awareness, damage scaling knowledge
▸ The scroll reads like a contract.
Choose a way of fighting.
The world will test whether you chose correctly.
▶ Find the Scales & Steel scroll [check]
▶ Learn your D&C class [check]
◇ Each D&C class has a unique armor set.
Forgotten Knight armor drops from the class dungeon.
Ch11 boss chain drops class-specific gear.
